nasb.text: But, indeed, for this reason I have allowed you to remain, in order to show you My power and in order to proclaim My name through all the earth.

esv.text: But for this purpose I have raised you up, to show you my power, so that my name may be proclaimed in all the earth.

cnv.text: 然而我使你存留，是為了使你看見我的能力，並且在全地上傳講我的名。

ccb.text: 我让你活到现在，是为了向你彰显我的权能，使我的名传遍天下。
